business.name: Carter Care Tree Service, LLC
business.tagline: Expert tree care when Charleston needs it most

hero.headline: Trees down? *We're already on the way.*
hero.subheadline: Storm damage, dangerous limbs, or roots cracking your foundation — Aaron and the crew handle what other companies won't touch.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every tree situation — handled
services_section.subheading: From storm cleanup to foundation-threatening roots

services.title: Emergency Tree Removal
services.description: Trees on houses, blocking driveways, or tangled in power lines. We clear the damage so you can get back to normal.

services.title: Dangerous Tree Assessment
services.description: Leaning trees, dead limbs, or anything that keeps you up during storms. We identify problems before they become disasters.

services.title: Root System Management
services.description: Roots cracking foundations or lifting driveways. Strategic removal that saves your property without killing the tree.

services.title: Storm Damage Cleanup
services.description: Full yard restoration after severe weather. Debris removal, damaged tree care, and getting your property back in shape.

about.heading: Real expertise, real equipment, real results
about.body: Aaron and the Carter Care crew handle the complex, dangerous tree work that Charleston properties demand. One call gets you skilled professionals who show up ready to work.

reviews.name: Robin G.
reviews.text: Aaron has done numerous jobs for me and my Mom. Very professional and knowledgeable about all things trees. When Mom had a tree fall after a storm, he was there within 2 hours to remove it from the driveway.

reviews.name: Charles T.
reviews.text: Carter Care helped my grandma with trees that bothered her during storms. Very professional and the work was absolutely top notch. 10/10 recommend for any tree clearing needs.

reviews.name: Clif B.
reviews.text: Aaron and his team are highly skilled, professional, and courteous. They did a remarkable job removing 6 very complex and dangerous trees. Highly recommend.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Charleston and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional tree care throughout the Kanawha Valley

cta.heading: Tree problems don't wait — neither should you
cta.body: Get honest assessment and upfront pricing. Aaron personally handles every estimate and explains exactly what needs done.
